testcase.name: test_caselaw_databases_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('databases' in {'national': [{'coverage': 'All Commonwealth, State, and Territory courts', 'description': '500,000+ searchable case law documents across all Australian jurisdictions', 'icon': 'globe', 'id': 'austlii_all', ...}, {'coverage': 'High Court judgments', 'description': 'Decisions of the highest court in the Australian judicial system', 'icon': 'landmark', 'id': 'hca', ...}, {'coverage': 'Selected courts across all jurisdictions', 'description': 'Judgments and Decisions Enhanced — cross-jurisdiction awareness service', 'icon': 'search', 'id': 'jade', ...}, {'coverage': 'Academic papers and case citations', 'description': 'Academic and legal case search — useful for finding commentary', 'icon': 'graduation', 'id': 'google_scholar', ...}], 'states': {'act': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, Court of Appeal', 'description': 'ACT Supreme Court judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'act_courts', ...}, {'coverage': 'All ACT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive ACT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_act', ...}], 'primary_court': 'ACT Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Australian Capital Territory'}, 'nsw': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, D...scription': 'Official NSW Courts — judgments from 1988 onwards', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'nsw_caselaw', ...}, {'coverage': 'All NSW courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NSW case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nsw', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NSW Court of Criminal Appeal', 'state_name': 'New South Wales'}, 'nt': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'All NT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nt', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NT Supreme Court', 'state_name': 'Northern Territory'}, 'qld': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Court of Appeal, Supreme Court, District Court, Magistrates Court', 'description': 'Authorised reports and unreported judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'qld_judgments', ...}, {'coverage': 'Queensland sentencing data and decisions', 'description': 'Sentencing information, case summaries, public remarks', 'icon': 'library', 'id': 'sclqld', ...}, {'coverage': 'All Queensland courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive QLD case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_qld', ...}], 'primary_court': 'Queensland Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Queensland'}, ...}} or False) + where False = isinstance({'national': [{'coverage': 'All Commonwealth, State, and Territory courts', 'description': '500,000+ searchable case law documents across all Australian jurisdictions', 'icon': 'globe', 'id': 'austlii_all', ...}, {'coverage': 'High Court judgments', 'description': 'Decisions of the highest court in the Australian judicial system', 'icon': 'landmark', 'id': 'hca', ...}, {'coverage': 'Selected courts across all jurisdictions', 'description': 'Judgments and Decisions Enhanced — cross-jurisdiction awareness service', 'icon': 'search', 'id': 'jade', ...}, {'coverage': 'Academic papers and case citations', 'description': 'Academic and legal case search — useful for finding commentary', 'icon': 'graduation', 'id': 'google_scholar', ...}], 'states': {'act': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, Court of Appeal', 'description': 'ACT Supreme Court judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'act_courts', ...}, {'coverage': 'All ACT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive ACT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_act', ...}], 'primary_court': 'ACT Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Australian Capital Territory'}, 'nsw': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, D...scription': 'Official NSW Courts — judgments from 1988 onwards', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'nsw_caselaw', ...}, {'coverage': 'All NSW courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NSW case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nsw', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NSW Court of Criminal Appeal', 'state_name': 'New South Wales'}, 'nt': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'All NT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nt', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NT Supreme Court', 'state_name': 'Northern Territory'}, 'qld': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Court of Appeal, Supreme Court, District Court, Magistrates Court', 'description': 'Authorised reports and unreported judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'qld_judgments', ...}, {'coverage': 'Queensland sentencing data and decisions', 'description': 'Sentencing information, case summaries, public remarks', 'icon': 'library', 'id': 'sclqld', ...}, {'coverage': 'All Queensland courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive QLD case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_qld', ...}], 'primary_court': 'Queensland Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Queensland'}, ...}}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration137_bugfixes.py:200: in test_caselaw_databases_endpoint assert "databases" in data or isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert ('databases' in {'national': [{'coverage': 'All Commonwealth, State, and Territory courts', 'description': '500,000+ searchable case law documents across all Australian jurisdictions', 'icon': 'globe', 'id': 'austlii_all', ...}, {'coverage': 'High Court judgments', 'description': 'Decisions of the highest court in the Australian judicial system', 'icon': 'landmark', 'id': 'hca', ...}, {'coverage': 'Selected courts across all jurisdictions', 'description': 'Judgments and Decisions Enhanced — cross-jurisdiction awareness service', 'icon': 'search', 'id': 'jade', ...}, {'coverage': 'Academic papers and case citations', 'description': 'Academic and legal case search — useful for finding commentary', 'icon': 'graduation', 'id': 'google_scholar', ...}], 'states': {'act': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, Court of Appeal', 'description': 'ACT Supreme Court judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'act_courts', ...}, {'coverage': 'All ACT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive ACT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_act', ...}], 'primary_court': 'ACT Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Australian Capital Territory'}, 'nsw': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, D...scription': 'Official NSW Courts — judgments from 1988 onwards', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'nsw_caselaw', ...}, {'coverage': 'All NSW courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NSW case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nsw', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NSW Court of Criminal Appeal', 'state_name': 'New South Wales'}, 'nt': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'All NT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nt', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NT Supreme Court', 'state_name': 'Northern Territory'}, 'qld': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Court of Appeal, Supreme Court, District Court, Magistrates Court', 'description': 'Authorised reports and unreported judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'qld_judgments', ...}, {'coverage': 'Queensland sentencing data and decisions', 'description': 'Sentencing information, case summaries, public remarks', 'icon': 'library', 'id': 'sclqld', ...}, {'coverage': 'All Queensland courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive QLD case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_qld', ...}], 'primary_court': 'Queensland Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Queensland'}, ...}} or False) E + where False = isinstance({'national': [{'coverage': 'All Commonwealth, State, and Territory courts', 'description': '500,000+ searchable case law documents across all Australian jurisdictions', 'icon': 'globe', 'id': 'austlii_all', ...}, {'coverage': 'High Court judgments', 'description': 'Decisions of the highest court in the Australian judicial system', 'icon': 'landmark', 'id': 'hca', ...}, {'coverage': 'Selected courts across all jurisdictions', 'description': 'Judgments and Decisions Enhanced — cross-jurisdiction awareness service', 'icon': 'search', 'id': 'jade', ...}, {'coverage': 'Academic papers and case citations', 'description': 'Academic and legal case search — useful for finding commentary', 'icon': 'graduation', 'id': 'google_scholar', ...}], 'states': {'act': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, Court of Appeal', 'description': 'ACT Supreme Court judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'act_courts', ...}, {'coverage': 'All ACT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive ACT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_act', ...}], 'primary_court': 'ACT Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Australian Capital Territory'}, 'nsw': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Supreme Court, D...scription': 'Official NSW Courts — judgments from 1988 onwards', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'nsw_caselaw', ...}, {'coverage': 'All NSW courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NSW case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nsw', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NSW Court of Criminal Appeal', 'state_name': 'New South Wales'}, 'nt': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'All NT courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive NT case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_nt', ...}], 'primary_court': 'NT Supreme Court', 'state_name': 'Northern Territory'}, 'qld': {'databases': [{'coverage': 'Court of Appeal, Supreme Court, District Court, Magistrates Court', 'description': 'Authorised reports and unreported judgments', 'icon': 'scale', 'id': 'qld_judgments', ...}, {'coverage': 'Queensland sentencing data and decisions', 'description': 'Sentencing information, case summaries, public remarks', 'icon': 'library', 'id': 'sclqld', ...}, {'coverage': 'All Queensland courts and tribunals', 'description': 'Free comprehensive QLD case law database', 'icon': 'book', 'id': 'austlii_qld', ...}], 'primary_court': 'Queensland Court of Appeal', 'state_name': 'Queensland'}, ...}}, list)
